{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220401353BD38490110F22A10EC8"}"},"total":7104},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7132070942389568293","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书很好看，文笔很好，书的风格对我的胃口。情节也很好（情节不需要绕来绕去和无限套娃），主角假扮的身份有点神秘感，又失狠辣而不失霸气，而且还有点风雨不动安如山的平淡。境界升级也很快（这个我喜欢😍），还有个小炉。半无敌文风格，不是系统文胜似系统文…………"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660564734,"group_id":"7086064251445447716","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N22k8d/ChEAEwV218w2cpW8x1TYNACJ4xQ4B7CBDw43n","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a468f02c820a493d8969a76a9e45e669~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710631&x-signature=HRg1ghNmCZz%2Fb57Iekxi2Ajg0gs%3D","user_id":"1248637916809860","user_name":"爷不爽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1248637916809860","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1675743199,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7086064251445447716","book_info":{"abstract":"林辰穿越灵气复苏世界，因为没有觉醒天赋，成为了老师、同学和家人眼中的绝世废物，女友甚至还提出了分手。
天醒者？那是什么东西？我乃无上修真者！
诸天万界，绝代天骄，任你惊才艳艳，震慑古今，我抬手便可镇压。
四方强敌，八方势力，纵你大能无数，胆敢惹我，你便活不过三集。
社会我辰哥，人狠话不多，不是在扮猪吃虎，就是在扮猪吃虎的路上，哪个不开眼的敢来挑衅，弹指间便让你灰飞烟灭。
